channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 49ers' George Kittle Says He Wants to Be a Stay-at-Home Dad After Retiring
item.description: San Francisco 49ers tight end George Kittle spoke with a publication alongside his wife Claire ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft about his plans after football.

item.title: Kurt Russell on Son Boston's Career Choice: 'Every Hollywood Family Needs One'
item.description: Actor Kurt Russell joked that his eldest son's decision to become a therapist was a logical choice given that the rest of the family works in entertainment.

item.title: Donnie Wahlberg Says He Offered Half His Pay to Film 'Boston Blue' Entirely in Boston
item.description: Wahlberg revealed the show could not afford to film all scenes in Boston despite his financial offer, though it does occasionally shoot in the city.

item.title: Brenda Song Says Macaulay Culkin Actively Pitches Ideas for More 'Running Point' Appearances
item.description: Brenda Song and Kate Hudson described Macaulay Culkin's enthusiastic interest in expanding his role on the show, a level of involvement that surprised creator Mindy Kaling.

item.title: Stephen Colbert Addresses Speculation About His Future After Late Show Cancellation
item.description: Colbert responded to online speculation about his next move following the announcement that his late-night program will end in May after more than a decade on air.
